---
title: "Publications of Ron Johnston"
subtitle: "A searchable list of his published works, 1965&ndash;2020"
output:
  tint::tintHtml
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

[&larr; Back to *Geography and a Geographer*](index.html)

Ron Johnston published prolifically across six decades.<span class="marginnote">Using AI, some publications are matched against various research
themes using their abstract where possible (via
[OpenAlex](https://openalex.org){target="_blank"} and, where available, the
publisher's webpage) or title, plus the journal name or year if
informative. The three themes marked \* are those that Ron used to
describe his research interests. Keywords are recurring words drawn from
the titles and abstracts only.<br><br>
<span style="color:#888;">Last updated: 15 July 2026</span></span> This page lists
**1,621** of his works. **879** are drawn from his own, chronologically
numbered publication archive (the numbering system is his). A further **742** -
chiefly books, book chapters and reviews - are drawn from a 2013 CV. We have
'numbered' those A, B, C&hellip; onward. The list remains incomplete and
will continue to be checked, cleaned and updated.

Use the search boxes to find and filter publications. Where a DOI or other
persistent link is available it is included. Please let us know about any
missing references and, if you spot any errors, please select and report them
so we can update the records.

<div class="fullwidth" id="pubs-app">

```{=html}
<div id="pubs-controls">
<input type="text" id="pubs-search" placeholder="Search citations (e.g. author, journal, keyword)&hellip;" autocomplete="off">
<select id="pubs-decade"></select>
<select id="pubs-type"></select>
<select id="pubs-theme"></select>
<select id="pubs-keyword"></select>
<select id="pubs-coauthor"></select>
<select id="pubs-link-filter">
<option value="all">All entries</option>
<option value="link">With a link only</option>
</select>
<span id="pubs-count"></span>
<span id="pubs-selected-count">0 selected</span>
<button type="button" id="pubs-select-all" class="pubs-toolbar-btn">Select all</button>
<button type="button" id="pubs-deselect-all" class="pubs-toolbar-btn" disabled>Deselect all</button>
<button type="button" id="pubs-export-btn" class="pubs-toolbar-btn" disabled>Export</button>
<button type="button" id="pubs-report-btn" class="pubs-toolbar-btn" disabled>Report error</button>
</div>
```

<table class="fullwidth" id="pubs-table">
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th style="width:3.5em;" title="Ron's own publication number">#<span class="pubs-sort-btns" data-sort-key="o"><button type="button" class="pubs-sort-btn" data-key="o" data-dir="1" aria-label="Sort by # ascending">&#9650;</button><button type="button" class="pubs-sort-btn" data-key="o" data-dir="-1" aria-label="Sort by # descending">&#9660;</button></span></th>
      <th style="width:5em;">Year<span class="pubs-sort-btns" data-sort-key="year"><button type="button" class="pubs-sort-btn" data-key="year" data-dir="1" aria-label="Sort by year ascending">&#9650;</button><button type="button" class="pubs-sort-btn" data-key="year" data-dir="-1" aria-label="Sort by year descending">&#9660;</button></span></th>
      <th>Publication<span class="pubs-sort-btns" data-sort-key="title"><button type="button" class="pubs-sort-btn" data-key="title" data-dir="1" aria-label="Sort by title ascending">&#9650;</button><button type="button" class="pubs-sort-btn" data-key="title" data-dir="-1" aria-label="Sort by title descending">&#9660;</button></span></th>
      <th style="width:3.5em;" title="Select to report an error, suggest an addition, or export">Select</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody id="pubs-tbody"></tbody>
</table>

<p id="pubs-empty" style="display:none;">No publications match your search.</p>

<dialog id="pubs-report-dialog">
<form id="pubs-report-form" method="dialog">
<h3 style="margin-top:0;">Report an error</h3>
<p>You're reporting a problem with:</p>
<ul id="pubs-report-list"></ul>
<label for="pubs-report-comment"><strong>What's wrong?</strong></label><br>
<textarea id="pubs-report-comment" rows="5" placeholder="Describe the error or mistake&hellip;" required></textarea>

<!-- Honeypot: real visitors never see or fill this in; if it's non-empty
on submission, Formspree silently discards the message as spam. -->
<input type="text" name="_gotcha" style="display:none" tabindex="-1" autocomplete="off">

<div class="g-recaptcha" data-sitekey="6Lc7oFMtAAAAACJToABdUhdrwIQmF1bT07B5lVVL"></div>

<p id="pubs-report-status" role="status"></p>

<div class="pubs-report-actions">
<button type="button" id="pubs-report-cancel">Cancel</button>
<button type="submit" id="pubs-report-send">Send</button>
</div>
</form>
</dialog>

<dialog id="pubs-suggest-dialog">
<form id="pubs-suggest-form" method="dialog">
<h3 style="margin-top:0;">Suggest a publication to add</h3>
<p>Fill in whatever you know - not every field will apply in every case.</p>

<label for="pubs-suggest-year">Year</label>
<input type="text" id="pubs-suggest-year" name="Year" autocomplete="off">

<label for="pubs-suggest-coauthors">Co-authors</label>
<input type="text" id="pubs-suggest-coauthors" name="Co-authors" autocomplete="off">

<label for="pubs-suggest-title">Title <span aria-hidden="true">*</span></label>
<input type="text" id="pubs-suggest-title" name="Title" autocomplete="off" required>

<label for="pubs-suggest-journal">Journal name</label>
<input type="text" id="pubs-suggest-journal" name="Journal Name" autocomplete="off">

<label for="pubs-suggest-volume">Volume</label>
<input type="text" id="pubs-suggest-volume" name="Volume" autocomplete="off">

<label for="pubs-suggest-number">Number</label>
<input type="text" id="pubs-suggest-number" name="Number" autocomplete="off">

<label for="pubs-suggest-publisher">Book publisher</label>
<input type="text" id="pubs-suggest-publisher" name="Book Publisher" autocomplete="off">

<label for="pubs-suggest-pages">Pages</label>
<input type="text" id="pubs-suggest-pages" name="Pages" autocomplete="off">

<label for="pubs-suggest-link">Link to online version</label>
<input type="text" id="pubs-suggest-link" name="Link" autocomplete="off">

<label for="pubs-suggest-other">Anything else</label>
<textarea id="pubs-suggest-other" name="Anything else" rows="3"></textarea>

<!-- Honeypot: real visitors never see or fill this in; if it's non-empty
on submission, Formspree silently discards the message as spam. -->
<input type="text" name="_gotcha" style="display:none" tabindex="-1" autocomplete="off">

<div class="g-recaptcha" data-sitekey="6Lc7oFMtAAAAACJToABdUhdrwIQmF1bT07B5lVVL"></div>

<p id="pubs-suggest-status" role="status"></p>

<div class="pubs-report-actions">
<button type="button" id="pubs-suggest-cancel">Cancel</button>
<button type="submit" id="pubs-suggest-send">Send</button>
</div>
</form>
</dialog>

<div id="pubs-modal-backdrop"></div>

<dialog id="pubs-abstract-dialog">
<div id="pubs-abstract-inner">
<button type="button" id="pubs-abstract-close" aria-label="Close">&times;</button>
<h3 id="pubs-abstract-title">Abstract</h3>
<div id="pubs-abstract-text"></div>
</div>
</dialog>

</div>

<style>
#pubs-app { font-family: Roboto, Calibri, sans-serif; }

:root { --pubs-controls-h: 4.4rem; }

#pubs-controls {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.6rem;
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0.9rem 0;
  position: sticky;
  top: 0;
  background: #fefefe;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;
  z-index: 20;
}

#pubs-search {
  flex: 1 1 20rem;
  padding: 0.45rem 0.7rem;
  font-size: 1rem;
  font-family: inherit;
  border: 1px solid #999;
  background: #fffff8;
  color: #111;
}

#pubs-decade, #pubs-type, #pubs-theme, #pubs-keyword, #pubs-coauthor, #pubs-link-filter {
  padding: 0.45rem 0.6rem;
  font-size: 1rem;
  font-family: inherit;
  border: 1px solid #999;
  background: #fffff8;
  color: #111;
}

#pubs-count {
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  color: #555;
  margin-left: auto;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

table#pubs-table {
  border-collapse: collapse;
  width: 100%;
}

#pubs-table th {
  text-align: left;
  padding: 0.5rem 0.6rem;
  font-family: "Roboto Condensed Bold", Arial, sans-serif;
  font-weight: 400;
  user-select: none;
  position: sticky;
  top: var(--pubs-controls-h);
  background: #fefefe;
  box-shadow: 0 1px 0 #111;
  z-index: 10;
}

.pubs-sort-btns {
  display: inline-flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  vertical-align: middle;
  margin-left: 0.3em;
  line-height: 0.6;
}

.pubs-sort-btn {
  border: none;
  background: none;
  padding: 0;
  margin: 0;
  font-size: 0.6em;
  color: #000;
  opacity: 0.35;
  cursor: pointer;
  line-height: 0.7;
}

.pubs-sort-btn:hover { opacity: 0.8; }
.pubs-sort-btn.pubs-sort-active { opacity: 1; }

#pubs-table td {
  padding: 0.5rem 0.6rem;
  border-top: 1px solid #ddd;
  vertical-align: top;
  font-size: 1rem;
  line-height: 1.35;
}

#pubs-table tr:hover td { background: #f3f1e7; }

.pubs-year-cell { font-family: "Roboto Mono", Consolas, monospace; color: #444; }
.pubs-num-cell { font-family: "Roboto Mono", Consolas, monospace; color: #888; }

a.pubs-link, a.pubs-link:link, a.pubs-link:visited {
  margin-left: 0.5em;
  white-space: nowrap;
  font-size: 0.9em;
  color: #1565c0;
  text-decoration: underline;
  text-shadow: none;
  background: none;
}

button.pubs-abstract-link {
  margin-left: 0.5em;
  white-space: nowrap;
  font-size: 0.9em;
  color: #5b2c83;
  text-decoration: underline;
  background: none;
  border: none;
  padding: 0;
  font: inherit;
  cursor: pointer;
}

#pubs-abstract-dialog {
  width: min(34rem, 90vw);
  max-height: 80vh;
  overflow: hidden;
  border: 1px solid #999;
  border-radius: 0.4em;
  padding: 0;
  background: transparent;
  color: #222;
}

#pubs-abstract-dialog::backdrop {
  background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
}

#pubs-abstract-inner {
  position: relative;
  box-sizing: border-box;
  max-height: 80vh;
  overflow-y: auto;
  padding: 1.2rem 1.6rem;
  border-radius: 0.4em;
  background: #eaeaea;
  font-family: "Roboto Condensed", Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;
  color: #222;
}

#pubs-abstract-title {
  margin: 0 1.6rem 0.6rem 0;
  font-size: 1.05rem;
}

#pubs-abstract-text {
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  line-height: 1.5;
}

#pubs-abstract-close {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0.7rem;
  right: 0.9rem;
  border: none;
  background: none;
  font-size: 1.4rem;
  line-height: 1;
  cursor: pointer;
  color: #555;
}

.pubs-theme-tag {
  display: inline-block;
  margin: 0.3em 0.35em 0 0;
  padding: 0.1em 0.5em;
  font-size: 0.78em;
  font-family: "Roboto Condensed", Arial, sans-serif;
  border-radius: 0.9em;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.pubs-theme-high {
  background: #ded6a3;
  color: #3a2f00;
}

.pubs-theme-medium {
  background: #eae7da;
  color: #444;
}

.pubs-keyword-tag {
  display: inline-block;
  margin: 0.3em 0.3em 0 0;
  padding: 0.05em 0.45em;
  font-size: 0.75em;
  font-family: "Roboto Condensed", Arial, sans-serif;
  border-radius: 0.3em;
  white-space: nowrap;
  background: #eef3f1;
  color: #3d6b5c;
  border: 1px solid #cfe0da;
}

@media screen and (max-width: 760px) {
  #pubs-count, #pubs-selected-count { margin-left: 0; }
  .pubs-toolbar-btn { margin-left: 0; }
}

#pubs-selected-count {
  margin-left: 0.8rem;
  color: #666;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
}

.pubs-toolbar-btn {
  margin-left: 0.5rem;
  padding: 0.45rem 0.9rem;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  font-family: inherit;
  border: 1px solid #999;
  background: #fffff8;
  color: #111;
  cursor: pointer;
  border-radius: 0.25em;
}

.pubs-toolbar-btn:disabled {
  color: #aaa;
  border-color: #ddd;
  background: #f5f5f0;
  cursor: not-allowed;
}

.pubs-toolbar-btn:not(:disabled):hover {
  background: #eae7da;
}

.pubs-select-cell { text-align: center; }

/* These two dialogs are opened with .show() rather than .showModal() (paired
with #pubs-modal-backdrop below), not .showModal() - a native modal <dialog>
renders in the browser's top layer, which sits above everything on the page
including reCAPTCHA's own challenge popup, so the picture-verification step
was rendering behind the dialog and was unreachable. A manually-positioned
dialog plus a manual backdrop avoids the top layer entirely, letting
reCAPTCHA's high z-index challenge iframe render above it as intended. */
#pubs-report-dialog, #pubs-suggest-dialog {
  position: fixed;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  margin: 0;
  z-index: 1000;
  width: min(32rem, 90vw);
  max-height: 85vh;
  overflow-y: auto;
  border: 1px solid #999;
  border-radius: 0.4em;
  padding: 1.2rem 1.5rem;
  font-family: Roboto, Calibri, sans-serif;
  background: #fffff8;
  color: #222;
}

#pubs-modal-backdrop {
  display: none;
  position: fixed;
  inset: 0;
  background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
  z-index: 999;
}

#pubs-suggest-form label {
  display: block;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  font-weight: bold;
  margin: 0.6rem 0 0.2rem 0;
}

#pubs-suggest-form input[type="text"],
#pubs-suggest-form textarea {
  width: 100%;
  box-sizing: border-box;
  font-family: inherit;
  font-size: 1rem;
  padding: 0.4rem;
}

#pubs-suggest-status {
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  min-height: 1.2em;
}

#pubs-suggest-status.pubs-status-error { color: #a33; }
#pubs-suggest-status.pubs-status-ok { color: #2a7a2a; }

#pubs-report-list {
  max-height: 8rem;
  overflow-y: auto;
  font-size: 0.92rem;
  padding-left: 1.2rem;
  border: 1px solid #ddd;
  background: #f8f7f2;
}

#pubs-report-comment {
  width: 100%;
  box-sizing: border-box;
  font-family: inherit;
  font-size: 1rem;
  padding: 0.5rem;
  margin: 0.4rem 0 1rem 0;
}

#pubs-report-status {
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  min-height: 1.2em;
}

#pubs-report-status.pubs-status-error { color: #a33; }
#pubs-report-status.pubs-status-ok { color: #2a7a2a; }

.pubs-report-actions {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: flex-end;
  gap: 0.6rem;
}

.pubs-report-actions button {
  padding: 0.45rem 1rem;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  font-family: inherit;
  border: 1px solid #999;
  border-radius: 0.25em;
  cursor: pointer;
  background: #fffff8;
}

#pubs-report-send {
  background: #1565c0;
  color: #fff;
  border-color: #1565c0;
}

#pubs-report-send:disabled {
  background: #aac4e0;
  border-color: #aac4e0;
  cursor: not-allowed;
}

#pubs-suggest-send {
  background: #1565c0;
  color: #fff;
  border-color: #1565c0;
}

#pubs-suggest-send:disabled {
  background: #aac4e0;
  border-color: #aac4e0;
  cursor: not-allowed;
}
</style>

<script src="publications_data.js"></script>
<script>
(function () {
  // Always start at the top of the page - browsers sometimes restore a
  // previous scroll position on reload or back/forward navigation, which is
  // disorienting on a page this long.
  if ("scrollRestoration" in history) history.scrollRestoration = "manual";
  window.scrollTo(0, 0);
  window.addEventListener("pageshow", function () { window.scrollTo(0, 0); });

  var data = PUBLICATIONS.slice();

  var tbody = document.getElementById("pubs-tbody");
  var searchBox = document.getElementById("pubs-search");
  var decadeSelect = document.getElementById("pubs-decade");
  var typeSelect = document.getElementById("pubs-type");
  var themeSelect = document.getElementById("pubs-theme");
  var keywordSelect = document.getElementById("pubs-keyword");
  var coauthorSelect = document.getElementById("pubs-coauthor");
  var linkFilter = document.getElementById("pubs-link-filter");
  var countEl = document.getElementById("pubs-count");
  var emptyEl = document.getElementById("pubs-empty");
  var sortButtons = document.querySelectorAll(".pubs-sort-btn");

  // Themes Ron himself used to describe his research interests - marked
  // with an asterisk wherever a theme name is displayed. The underlying
  // name (used for matching/filtering) is unchanged.
  var PRIMARY_MARKED_THEMES = [
    "Electoral and political geography",
    "History of human geography",
    "Urban social geography",
  ];
  function themeLabel(name) {
    return PRIMARY_MARKED_THEMES.indexOf(name) !== -1 ? name + " *" : name;
  }

  var selectedCountEl = document.getElementById("pubs-selected-count");
  var selectAllBtn = document.getElementById("pubs-select-all");
  var deselectAllBtn = document.getElementById("pubs-deselect-all");
  var exportBtn = document.getElementById("pubs-export-btn");
  var reportBtn = document.getElementById("pubs-report-btn");
  var reportDialog = document.getElementById("pubs-report-dialog");
  var reportForm = document.getElementById("pubs-report-form");
  var reportList = document.getElementById("pubs-report-list");
  var reportComment = document.getElementById("pubs-report-comment");
  var reportCancel = document.getElementById("pubs-report-cancel");
  var reportSend = document.getElementById("pubs-report-send");
  var reportStatus = document.getElementById("pubs-report-status");
  var suggestDialog = document.getElementById("pubs-suggest-dialog");
  var suggestForm = document.getElementById("pubs-suggest-form");
  var suggestCancel = document.getElementById("pubs-suggest-cancel");
  var suggestSend = document.getElementById("pubs-suggest-send");
  var suggestStatus = document.getElementById("pubs-suggest-status");
  var abstractDialog = document.getElementById("pubs-abstract-dialog");
  var abstractTitle = document.getElementById("pubs-abstract-title");
  var abstractText = document.getElementById("pubs-abstract-text");
  var abstractClose = document.getElementById("pubs-abstract-close");
  var modalBackdrop = document.getElementById("pubs-modal-backdrop");

  // The report/suggest dialogs are opened with .show() + this manual backdrop
  // rather than .showModal(), so reCAPTCHA's challenge popup (which renders
  // outside the browser's top layer) can appear above them - see the CSS
  // comment on #pubs-report-dialog for why.
  function openManagedDialog(dialog) {
    modalBackdrop.style.display = "block";
    dialog.show();
  }
  function closeManagedDialog(dialog) {
    dialog.close();
    modalBackdrop.style.display = "none";
  }
  modalBackdrop.addEventListener("click", function () {
    if (reportDialog.open) closeManagedDialog(reportDialog);
    if (suggestDialog.open) closeManagedDialog(suggestDialog);
  });
  var byId = {};
  data.forEach(function (d) { byId[d.o] = d; });
  var selectedRows = new Set();
  var lastFiltered = [];

  var sortKey = "o";
  var sortDir = 1;

  function titleOnly(citation) {
    return citation.replace(/^\(with[^)]*\)\s*/i, "");
  }

  function compareForSort(a, b) {
    if (sortKey === "year") {
      var aNull = a.year === null, bNull = b.year === null;
      if (aNull && bNull) return a.o - b.o;
      if (aNull) return 1;
      if (bNull) return -1;
      if (a.year !== b.year) return (a.year - b.year) * sortDir;
      return a.o - b.o;
    }
    if (sortKey === "title") {
      var at = titleOnly(a.citation).toLowerCase();
      var bt = titleOnly(b.citation).toLowerCase();
      if (at < bt) return -1 * sortDir;
      if (at > bt) return 1 * sortDir;
      return a.o - b.o;
    }
    // "o" - the site's own internal sequence: archive records (numbered by
    // Ron) sort before CV records (lettered), and numerically/alphabetically
    // within each, since o is assigned continuously across both.
    return (a.o - b.o) * sortDir;
  }

  // Build decade options
  var decades = {};
  data.forEach(function (d) {
    var key = d.year ? (Math.floor(d.year / 10) * 10) + "s" : "Undated";
    decades[key] = true;
  });
  var decadeKeys = Object.keys(decades).filter(function (k) { return k !== "Undated"; }).sort();
  if (decades["Undated"]) decadeKeys.push("Undated");

  var allOption = document.createElement("option");
  allOption.value = "all";
  allOption.textContent = "All decades";
  decadeSelect.appendChild(allOption);
  decadeKeys.forEach(function (k) {
    var opt = document.createElement("option");
    opt.value = k;
    opt.textContent = k === "Undated" ? "Undated" : k;
    decadeSelect.appendChild(opt);
  });

  function decadeOf(year) {
    return year ? (Math.floor(year / 10) * 10) + "s" : "Undated";
  }

  // Build type options
  var typeCounts = {};
  data.forEach(function (d) {
    typeCounts[d.type] = (typeCounts[d.type] || 0) + 1;
  });
  var typeKeys = Object.keys(typeCounts)
    .sort(function (a, b) { return typeCounts[b] - typeCounts[a]; });

  var allTypeOption = document.createElement("option");
  allTypeOption.value = "all";
  allTypeOption.textContent = "All types";
  typeSelect.appendChild(allTypeOption);
  typeKeys.forEach(function (k) {
    var opt = document.createElement("option");
    opt.value = k;
    opt.textContent = k + " (" + typeCounts[k] + ")";
    typeSelect.appendChild(opt);
  });

  // Build theme options. d.themes is a list of [name, score] pairs.
  var themeCounts = {};
  var noThemeCount = 0;
  data.forEach(function (d) {
    if (d.themes && d.themes.length) {
      d.themes.forEach(function (t) { themeCounts[t[0]] = (themeCounts[t[0]] || 0) + 1; });
    } else {
      noThemeCount++;
    }
  });
  var themeKeys = Object.keys(themeCounts).sort();

  var allThemeOption = document.createElement("option");
  allThemeOption.value = "all";
  allThemeOption.textContent = "All themes";
  themeSelect.appendChild(allThemeOption);
  themeKeys.forEach(function (k) {
    var opt = document.createElement("option");
    opt.value = k;
    opt.textContent = themeLabel(k) + " (" + themeCounts[k] + ")";
    themeSelect.appendChild(opt);
  });
  if (noThemeCount) {
    var noThemeOption = document.createElement("option");
    noThemeOption.value = "__unclassified__";
    noThemeOption.textContent = "Unclassified (" + noThemeCount + ")";
    themeSelect.appendChild(noThemeOption);
  }

  // Build keyword options
  var keywordCounts = {};
  var noKeywordCount = 0;
  data.forEach(function (d) {
    if (d.keywords && d.keywords.length) {
      d.keywords.forEach(function (k) { keywordCounts[k] = (keywordCounts[k] || 0) + 1; });
    } else {
      noKeywordCount++;
    }
  });
  var keywordKeys = Object.keys(keywordCounts).sort();

  var allKeywordOption = document.createElement("option");
  allKeywordOption.value = "all";
  allKeywordOption.textContent = "All keywords";
  keywordSelect.appendChild(allKeywordOption);
  keywordKeys.forEach(function (k) {
    var opt = document.createElement("option");
    opt.value = k;
    opt.textContent = k + " (" + keywordCounts[k] + ")";
    keywordSelect.appendChild(opt);
  });
  if (noKeywordCount) {
    var noKeywordOption = document.createElement("option");
    noKeywordOption.value = "__none__";
    noKeywordOption.textContent = "No keywords (" + noKeywordCount + ")";
    keywordSelect.appendChild(noKeywordOption);
  }

  // Build co-author options. Collaborators who appear only once are folded
  // into an "Others" bucket so the list of ~120 names doesn't overwhelm the
  // dropdown; anyone with at least MIN_COAUTHOR_WORKS gets their own entry.
  var MIN_COAUTHOR_WORKS = 2;
  var coauthorCounts = {};
  data.forEach(function (d) {
    (d.coauthors || []).forEach(function (c) {
      coauthorCounts[c] = (coauthorCounts[c] || 0) + 1;
    });
  });
  // Labels are "Initial Surname" (e.g. "R Harris") - sort by surname, not
  // by the leading initial, so "R Harris" comes before "C Harrison".
  function surnameOf(label) { return label.slice(label.indexOf(" ") + 1); }
  var namedCoauthors = Object.keys(coauthorCounts)
    .filter(function (k) { return coauthorCounts[k] >= MIN_COAUTHOR_WORKS; })
    .sort(function (a, b) {
      var sa = surnameOf(a), sb = surnameOf(b);
      return sa === sb ? a.localeCompare(b) : sa.localeCompare(sb);
    });
  var othersCount = Object.keys(coauthorCounts)
    .filter(function (k) { return coauthorCounts[k] < MIN_COAUTHOR_WORKS; }).length;

  var allCoauthorOption = document.createElement("option");
  allCoauthorOption.value = "all";
  allCoauthorOption.textContent = "All collaborators";
  coauthorSelect.appendChild(allCoauthorOption);
  var soleOption = document.createElement("option");
  soleOption.value = "__sole__";
  soleOption.textContent = "Sole-authored only";
  coauthorSelect.appendChild(soleOption);
  namedCoauthors.forEach(function (k) {
    var opt = document.createElement("option");
    opt.value = k;
    opt.textContent = k + " (" + coauthorCounts[k] + ")";
    coauthorSelect.appendChild(opt);
  });
  if (othersCount) {
    var othersOption = document.createElement("option");
    othersOption.value = "__others__";
    othersOption.textContent = "Others (" + othersCount + " one-off collaborators)";
    coauthorSelect.appendChild(othersOption);
  }

  function render() {
    var q = searchBox.value.trim().toLowerCase();
    var decadeVal = decadeSelect.value;
    var typeVal = typeSelect.value;
    var themeVal = themeSelect.value;
    var keywordVal = keywordSelect.value;
    var coauthorVal = coauthorSelect.value;
    var linkVal = linkFilter.value;

    var filtered = data.filter(function (d) {
      if (q) {
        var themeText = (d.themes || []).map(function (t) { return t[0]; }).join(" ");
        var keywordText = (d.keywords || []).join(" ");
        var haystack = (d.citation + " " + themeText + " " + keywordText).toLowerCase();
        if (haystack.indexOf(q) === -1) return false;
      }
      if (decadeVal !== "all" && decadeOf(d.year) !== decadeVal) return false;
      if (typeVal !== "all" && d.type !== typeVal) return false;
      if (themeVal === "__unclassified__" && d.themes && d.themes.length) return false;
      if (themeVal !== "all" && themeVal !== "__unclassified__" &&
          (!d.themes || !d.themes.some(function (t) { return t[0] === themeVal; }))) return false;
      if (keywordVal === "__none__" && d.keywords && d.keywords.length) return false;
      if (keywordVal !== "all" && keywordVal !== "__none__" &&
          (!d.keywords || d.keywords.indexOf(keywordVal) === -1)) return false;
      if (coauthorVal === "__sole__" && d.coauthors && d.coauthors.length) return false;
      if (coauthorVal === "__others__" && !(d.coauthors || []).some(function (c) { return coauthorCounts[c] < MIN_COAUTHOR_WORKS; })) return false;
      if (coauthorVal !== "all" && coauthorVal !== "__sole__" && coauthorVal !== "__others__" && (!d.coauthors || d.coauthors.indexOf(coauthorVal) === -1)) return false;
      if (linkVal === "link" && !d.link) return false;
      return true;
    });

    filtered.sort(compareForSort);

    tbody.textContent = "";
    var frag = document.createDocumentFragment();

    filtered.forEach(function (d) {
      var tr = document.createElement("tr");

      var tdNum = document.createElement("td");
      tdNum.className = "pubs-num-cell";
      tdNum.textContent = d.id;
      tr.appendChild(tdNum);

      var tdYear = document.createElement("td");
      tdYear.className = "pubs-year-cell";
      tdYear.textContent = d.year ? d.year : "n.d.";
      tr.appendChild(tdYear);

      var tdCite = document.createElement("td");
      tdCite.textContent = d.citation;
      if (d.abstract) {
        var abstractBtn = document.createElement("button");
        abstractBtn.type = "button";
        abstractBtn.className = "pubs-abstract-link";
        abstractBtn.textContent = "[abstract]";
        abstractBtn.setAttribute("data-o", d.o);
        tdCite.appendChild(document.createTextNode(" "));
        tdCite.appendChild(abstractBtn);
      }
      if (d.synopsis) {
        var synopsisBtn = document.createElement("button");
        synopsisBtn.type = "button";
        synopsisBtn.className = "pubs-abstract-link pubs-synopsis-link";
        synopsisBtn.textContent = "[synopsis]";
        synopsisBtn.setAttribute("data-o", d.o);
        tdCite.appendChild(document.createTextNode(" "));
        tdCite.appendChild(synopsisBtn);
      }
      if (d.list) {
        var listBtn = document.createElement("button");
        listBtn.type = "button";
        listBtn.className = "pubs-abstract-link pubs-list-link";
        listBtn.textContent = d.listPartial ? "[partial list]" : "[list]";
        listBtn.setAttribute("data-o", d.o);
        tdCite.appendChild(document.createTextNode(" "));
        tdCite.appendChild(listBtn);
      }
      (d.themes || []).forEach(function (t) {
        var name = t[0], score = t[1];
        var confidence = score >= 0.25 ? "high" : "medium";
        var tag = document.createElement("span");
        tag.className = "pubs-theme-tag pubs-theme-" + confidence;
        tag.textContent = themeLabel(name);
        tdCite.appendChild(tag);
      });
      (d.keywords || []).forEach(function (k) {
        var tag = document.createElement("span");
        tag.className = "pubs-keyword-tag";
        tag.textContent = k;
        tdCite.appendChild(tag);
      });
      if (d.link) {
        var a = document.createElement("a");
        a.href = d.link;
        a.target = "_blank";
        a.rel = "noopener noreferrer";
        a.className = "pubs-link";
        a.textContent = "[view]";
        tdCite.appendChild(document.createTextNode(" "));
        tdCite.appendChild(a);
      }
      tr.appendChild(tdCite);

      var tdSelect = document.createElement("td");
      tdSelect.className = "pubs-select-cell";
      var checkbox = document.createElement("input");
      checkbox.type = "checkbox";
      checkbox.className = "pubs-select-checkbox";
      checkbox.setAttribute("data-o", d.o);
      checkbox.checked = selectedRows.has(d.o);
      checkbox.setAttribute("aria-label", "Select this publication");
      tdSelect.appendChild(checkbox);
      tr.appendChild(tdSelect);

      frag.appendChild(tr);
    });

    tbody.appendChild(frag);
    emptyEl.style.display = filtered.length ? "none" : "block";
    countEl.textContent = "Showing " + filtered.length + " of " + data.length + " works";
    lastFiltered = filtered;
    updateSelectionUI();
  }

  searchBox.addEventListener("input", render);
  decadeSelect.addEventListener("change", render);
  typeSelect.addEventListener("change", render);
  themeSelect.addEventListener("change", render);
  keywordSelect.addEventListener("change", render);
  coauthorSelect.addEventListener("change", render);
  linkFilter.addEventListener("change", render);

  function updateSortButtonStyles() {
    sortButtons.forEach(function (btn) {
      var active = btn.getAttribute("data-key") === sortKey &&
        Number(btn.getAttribute("data-dir")) === sortDir;
      btn.classList.toggle("pubs-sort-active", active);
    });
  }

  sortButtons.forEach(function (btn) {
    btn.addEventListener("click", function () {
      sortKey = btn.getAttribute("data-key");
      sortDir = Number(btn.getAttribute("data-dir"));
      updateSortButtonStyles();
      render();
    });
  });
  updateSortButtonStyles();

  // The controls bar can wrap onto a second line on narrow screens, so its
  // height isn't fixed - measure it and feed the sticky table header the
  // right offset to sit directly beneath it, with no gap or overlap.
  var controlsEl = document.getElementById("pubs-controls");
  function syncStickyOffset() {
    document.documentElement.style.setProperty("--pubs-controls-h", controlsEl.offsetHeight + "px");
  }
  syncStickyOffset();
  window.addEventListener("resize", syncStickyOffset);

  // --- Error reporting ---
  var FORMSPREE_ENDPOINT = "https://formspree.io/f/xnjenvjj";

  function updateSelectionUI() {
    var n = selectedRows.size;
    selectedCountEl.textContent = n + " selected";
    deselectAllBtn.disabled = n === 0;
    exportBtn.disabled = n === 0;
    selectAllBtn.disabled = lastFiltered.length === 0;
    reportBtn.disabled = false;
    reportBtn.textContent = n === 0 ? "Report missing reference" : "Report error";
  }

  tbody.addEventListener("change", function (e) {
    if (!e.target.classList.contains("pubs-select-checkbox")) return;
    var o = Number(e.target.getAttribute("data-o"));
    if (e.target.checked) {
      selectedRows.add(o);
    } else {
      selectedRows.delete(o);
    }
    updateSelectionUI();
  });

  selectAllBtn.addEventListener("click", function () {
    lastFiltered.forEach(function (d) { selectedRows.add(d.o); });
    render();
  });

  deselectAllBtn.addEventListener("click", function () {
    selectedRows.clear();
    render();
  });

  function exportSelected() {
    var selected = data.filter(function (d) { return selectedRows.has(d.o); });
    selected.sort(function (a, b) { return a.o - b.o; });
    var lines = selected.map(function (d) {
      return "[" + (d.year ? d.year : "n.d.") + "] " + d.citation + (d.link ? " (" + d.link + ")" : "");
    });
    var blob = new Blob([lines.join("\n\n")], { type: "text/plain" });
    var filename = "ron-johnston-selected-publications.txt";

    if (window.showSaveFilePicker) {
      window.showSaveFilePicker({
        suggestedName: filename,
        types: [{ description: "Text file", accept: { "text/plain": [".txt"] } }],
      }).then(function (handle) {
        return handle.createWritable().then(function (writable) {
          return writable.write(blob).then(function () { return writable.close(); });
        });
      }).catch(function (err) {
        if (err && err.name !== "AbortError") downloadBlob(blob, filename);
      });
    } else {
      downloadBlob(blob, filename);
    }
  }

  function downloadBlob(blob, filename) {
    var url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    var a = document.createElement("a");
    a.href = url;
    a.download = filename;
    document.body.appendChild(a);
    a.click();
    document.body.removeChild(a);
    setTimeout(function () { URL.revokeObjectURL(url); }, 1000);
  }

  exportBtn.addEventListener("click", exportSelected);

  reportBtn.addEventListener("click", function () {
    if (selectedRows.size === 0) {
      suggestForm.reset();
      suggestStatus.textContent = "";
      suggestStatus.className = "";
      suggestSend.disabled = false;
      suggestSend.textContent = "Send";
      // Two reCAPTCHA widgets now exist on the page (report dialog's is
      // widget 0, this one is widget 1, in DOM order) - a bare reset()
      // always targets widget 0, so this must reset explicitly by index.
      if (window.grecaptcha && window.grecaptcha.reset) window.grecaptcha.reset(1);
      openManagedDialog(suggestDialog);
      return;
    }
    reportList.textContent = "";
    selectedRows.forEach(function (o) {
      var d = byId[o];
      if (!d) return;
      var li = document.createElement("li");
      li.textContent = "#" + d.id + " (" + (d.year ? d.year : "n.d.") + ") — " + d.citation;
      reportList.appendChild(li);
    });
    reportStatus.textContent = "";
    reportStatus.className = "";
    reportComment.value = "";
    reportSend.disabled = false;
    reportSend.textContent = "Send";
    if (window.grecaptcha && window.grecaptcha.reset) window.grecaptcha.reset(0);
    openManagedDialog(reportDialog);
  });

  reportCancel.addEventListener("click", function () {
    closeManagedDialog(reportDialog);
  });

  suggestCancel.addEventListener("click", function () {
    closeManagedDialog(suggestDialog);
  });

  // --- Abstract / Synopsis / List pop-up (shared dialog) ---
  tbody.addEventListener("click", function (e) {
    var btn = e.target.closest(".pubs-abstract-link");
    if (!btn) return;
    var d = byId[Number(btn.getAttribute("data-o"))];
    if (!d) return;
    var kind = btn.classList.contains("pubs-synopsis-link") ? "synopsis" :
      btn.classList.contains("pubs-list-link") ? "list" : "abstract";
    var text = d[kind];
    if (!text) return;
    abstractTitle.textContent = kind === "synopsis" ? "Synopsis" :
      kind === "list" ? (d.listPartial ? "Entries (partial list)" : "Entries") : "Abstract";
    abstractText.textContent = text;
    abstractDialog.showModal();
  });

  abstractClose.addEventListener("click", function () {
    abstractDialog.close();
  });

  abstractDialog.addEventListener("click", function (e) {
    if (e.target === abstractDialog) abstractDialog.close();
  });

  reportForm.addEventListener("submit", function (e) {
    e.preventDefault();

    var refLines = [];
    selectedRows.forEach(function (o) {
      var d = byId[o];
      if (!d) return;
      refLines.push("- #" + d.id + " (" + (d.year ? d.year : "n.d.") + ") " + d.citation + (d.link ? " (" + d.link + ")" : ""));
    });
    var fullMessage = reportComment.value + "\n\nFlagged references:\n" + refLines.join("\n");

    var formData = new FormData(reportForm);
    formData.set("_subject", "Ron's Publications");
    formData.set("message", fullMessage);

    reportSend.disabled = true;
    reportSend.textContent = "Sending…";
    reportStatus.textContent = "";
    reportStatus.className = "";

    fetch(FORMSPREE_ENDPOINT, {
      method: "POST",
      body: formData,
      headers: { "Accept": "application/json" },
    }).then(function (response) {
      if (!response.ok) throw new Error("submission failed");
      reportStatus.textContent = "Thank you — your report has been sent.";
      reportStatus.className = "pubs-status-ok";
      selectedRows.clear();
      render();
      setTimeout(function () { closeManagedDialog(reportDialog); }, 1500);
    }).catch(function () {
      reportStatus.textContent = "Something went wrong sending this. Please try again in a moment.";
      reportStatus.className = "pubs-status-error";
      reportSend.disabled = false;
      reportSend.textContent = "Send";
      if (window.grecaptcha && window.grecaptcha.reset) window.grecaptcha.reset(0);
    });
  });

  suggestForm.addEventListener("submit", function (e) {
    e.preventDefault();

    var fieldIds = [
      "pubs-suggest-year", "pubs-suggest-coauthors", "pubs-suggest-title",
      "pubs-suggest-journal", "pubs-suggest-volume", "pubs-suggest-number",
      "pubs-suggest-publisher", "pubs-suggest-pages", "pubs-suggest-link",
      "pubs-suggest-other",
    ];
    var lines = [];
    fieldIds.forEach(function (id) {
      var el = document.getElementById(id);
      var value = el.value.trim();
      if (!value) return;
      var label = el.previousElementSibling ? el.previousElementSibling.textContent.replace("*", "").trim() : id;
      lines.push(label + ": " + value);
    });
    var fullMessage = "Suggested publication to add:\n\n" + lines.join("\n");

    var formData = new FormData(suggestForm);
    formData.set("_subject", "Ron's Publications - Suggested addition");
    formData.set("message", fullMessage);

    suggestSend.disabled = true;
    suggestSend.textContent = "Sending…";
    suggestStatus.textContent = "";
    suggestStatus.className = "";

    fetch(FORMSPREE_ENDPOINT, {
      method: "POST",
      body: formData,
      headers: { "Accept": "application/json" },
    }).then(function (response) {
      if (!response.ok) throw new Error("submission failed");
      suggestStatus.textContent = "Thank you — your suggestion has been sent.";
      suggestStatus.className = "pubs-status-ok";
      setTimeout(function () { closeManagedDialog(suggestDialog); }, 1500);
    }).catch(function () {
      suggestStatus.textContent = "Something went wrong sending this. Please try again in a moment.";
      suggestStatus.className = "pubs-status-error";
      suggestSend.disabled = false;
      suggestSend.textContent = "Send";
      if (window.grecaptcha && window.grecaptcha.reset) window.grecaptcha.reset(1);
    });
  });

  render();
})();
</script>
<script src="https://www.google.com/recaptcha/api.js" async defer></script>
